result:
Clean build from scratch succeeds with no errors (grep found zero matches for "error"). All three binaries (`wpa_supplicant`, `wpa_cli`, `wpa_passphrase`) link successfully.

Summary of changes:
- `src/utils/os.h`: `os_get_time` now takes `(struct os_time *t, int clock_source)`.
- `src/utils/os_unix.c` (the implementation actually built here): added the parameter, behavior unchanged (parameter unused, same as before for any value including 0).
- `src/utils/os_internal.c`, `src/utils/os_none.c`, `src/utils/os_win32.c`: kept in sync with the same signature/behavior for consistency, even though they aren't compiled by this Makefile.
- All 29 call sites across the repo updated to pass `0` as the new argument.

`wpa_supplicant/ make` is fully green (clean rebuild, no errors).
